user_query: Add the Miso-Glazed Black Cod with Bok Choy to mothers day 3 dinner

fields.name: Miso-Glazed Black Cod with Bok Choy
fields.short_description: Tender black cod brushed with a savory-sweet miso glaze, roasted until caramelized and served alongside lightly sautéed bok choy for a delicate, umami-rich dinner.
fields.meal_suggestion: Marinate black cod fillets in a mixture of white miso, mirin, sake (or dry sherry), and a touch of sugar for at least 30 minutes or up to overnight. Pat off excess marinade, then broil or pan-sear the fillets until the glaze is caramelized and the fish flakes easily. Quickly sauté halved bok choy in sesame oil with garlic and a splash of soy sauce until tender-crisp. Serve the cod over steamed rice or alongside the bok choy, garnished with toasted sesame seeds and sliced scallions.
fields.nutrition_note: Black cod is rich in heart-healthy omega-3 fatty acids and high-quality protein. Bok choy provides vitamins A, C, and K plus calcium. Using moderate amounts of miso glaze keeps sodium in check while adding umami; pair with brown rice for added fiber.

result.reasoning: Add the requested dish to Mother's Day 3 dinner options. Position -1 appends it after existing dinner items under MealPlan_Version 2 > Mother > Day 3 > Dinner. Version 2 used as the most relevant existing plan in the context.
